## Verses (9)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O make a new song to the Lord, because he has done works of wonder; with his right hand, and with his holy arm, he has overcome. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | The Lord has given to all the knowledge of his salvation; he has made clear his righteousness in the eyes of the nations. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | He has kept in mind his mercy and his unchanging faith to the house of Israel; all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Let all the earth send out a glad cry to the Lord; sounding with a loud voice, and praising him with songs of joy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Make melody to the Lord with instruments of music; with a corded instrument and the voice of song. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | With wind instruments and the sound of the horn, make a glad cry before the Lord, the King. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Let the sea be thundering, with all its waters; the world, and all who are living in it; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Let the streams make sounds of joy with their hands; let the mountains be glad together, | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Before the Lord, for he has come as judge of the earth; judging the world in righteousness, and giving true decisions for the peoples. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
